accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: CRA disapproval of BOEM's rule published Sept. 3, 2024, approved March 14, 2025.

no_hallucinations.why: The Congressional Review Act attribution and BOEM identification are accurate context, and no false or invented claims appear.

states_purpose.why: The summary clearly states the resolution nullifies the BOEM marine archaeological resources rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The summary correctly explains the resolution invalidates the rule so it has no force or effect, naming the CRA mechanism.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no exceptions or conditions, and the summary accurately notes it creates none.

effective_dates.why: The summary correctly notes approval on March 14, 2025, Senate passage Feb. 25, and House passage March 6, matching the bill's legislative history.

major_provisions_covered.why: The summary captures the sole operative effect: the rule has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized, consistent, and reads clearly.

concise.why: The summary is appropriately brief with minimal padding.

correct_entities.why: BOEM, the rule title, the Federal Register, and the Congressional Review Act are all identified correctly.

correct_figures.why: Dates stated (Sept. 3, 2024; March 14, 2025; Feb. 25; March 6) all match the bill text's ground truth.
